name: Gcore Storage
tagline: Provision and manage Gcore Object Storage buckets and access keys
description: Create S3-compatible or SFTP storage resources, list available locations, and manage buckets and S3 access keys through Gcore's management REST API.

auth.hint: Generate a Gcore API token in the Customer Portal and store the complete header value 'APIKey <YOUR_GCORE_API_KEY>' (including the APIKey prefix) as the Authorization header secret.

tools.name: list_locations
tools.description: List available storage locations, their type (s3_compatible or sftp), and endpoint addresses.

tools.name: create_s3_storage
tools.description: Create a new S3-compatible object storage resource in a given location.

params.name: location_name
params.description: Location name from the locations list, for example luxembourg-2.

params.name: name
params.description: Storage name; the account ID is prefixed to form the full storage name.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List buckets within a storage resource.

params.name: storage_id
params.description: Numeric storage ID returned when the storage was created or from the storage list.

tools.name: create_bucket
tools.description: Create a new bucket within a storage resource.

params.name: storage_id
params.description: Numeric storage ID to create the bucket in.

tools.name: delete_bucket
tools.description: Delete a bucket, permanently removing all of its data.

params.name: storage_id
params.description: Numeric storage ID that owns the bucket.

params.name: bucket_name
params.description: Name of the bucket to delete.

tools.name: create_access_key
tools.description: Create a new S3 access key and secret key for a storage resource, for example during key rotation.

params.name: storage_id
params.description: Numeric storage ID to create the access key for.
